title: Immediate Aftermath
summary: Ada reorients to unchanged surroundings while carrying acute cognitive and physiological residue from the rupture.

narrative.newInfo: The room continuity and body-state mismatch make the event consequential, not ornamental.
narrative.dripHook: If almost no external time passed, what exactly consumed Ada's subjective interval?
narrative.payoffDelivered: Consequence reward: rupture has concrete aftermath.
narrative.notes: Use concrete unchanged-vs-changed contrasts; avoid vague 'shaken' shorthand.

rewardTokens.description: Destabilization is rendered through specific physical/cognitive aftereffects.
Ordinary observatory continuity intensifies the wrongness.
